title: Floral Home 20" Vibrant Lavender Hydrangea Bush with 7 Silk Sprays | UV Resistant | Artiicial Flower Bush | for Indoor & Outdoor Use | for Home, Office, Patio & Garden Decor (2 Pack)
features: Two-pack of 20-inch UV-resistant silk lavender hydrangea bushes with 7 sprays each
Mesmerizing beauty for captivating indoor and outdoor decor
Luxurious charm with soothing hues and realistic design
Perfect for creating stunning floral arrangements and adding a touch of elegance to any space
description: Create a dreamy and serene ambiance with the Lavender Dreamscape, a two-pack of 20-inch UV-resistant silk hydrangea bushes with 7 sprays each. The realistic design and soothing hues of these lavender flowers add a touch of luxury to any space, making them perfect for creating stunning floral arrangements or adding a pop of color to your home decor. Whether used indoors or outdoors, the Lavender Dreamscape is sure to captivate with its mesmerizing beauty and luxurious charm.
